languages.text: "Император, веди мою руку, ибо мне суждено взрезать и исцелить плоть страждущего. Не дай дрогнуть ни мне, ни моему сердцу..."
"Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."
languages.original_text: "Император, веди мою руку, ибо мне суждено взрезать и исцелить плоть страждущего. Не дай дрогнуть ни мне, ни моему сердцу..."

traits.locale_text: "Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."
"Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."
"Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."

languages.text: 「陛下、私の手を導いてください。私は苦しむ者の肉を傷つけ、癒す運命にあります。私の手も心も震えさせないでください…」
languages.original_text: "Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."

languages.text: "İmparator, acı çekenlerin etini kesip iyileştirmek benim kaderim olduğumdan elime rehberlik et. Elimi ya da kalbimi titretme..."
languages.original_text: "Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."

traits.locale_text: "İmparator, acı çekenlerin etini kesip iyileştirmek benim kaderim olduğumdan elime rehberlik et. Elimi ya da kalbimi titretme..."

languages.text: “神皇啊，请指引我的双手，因我注定要切割并治愈苦难之躯。请不要让我的双手或心灵颤抖不已……”
languages.original_text: "Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."

traits.locale_text: “神皇啊，请指引我的双手，因我注定要切割并治愈苦难之躯。请不要让我的双手或心灵颤抖不已……”

languages.text: "Imperator, führe meine Hand, denn ich bin dazu bestimmt, das Fleisch der Leidenden zu durchtrennen und zu heilen. Auf dass Herz und Hand nicht zittern mögen ..."
languages.original_text: "Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."

traits.locale_text: "Imperator, führe meine Hand, denn ich bin dazu bestimmt, das Fleisch der Leidenden zu durchtrennen und zu heilen. Auf dass Herz und Hand nicht zittern mögen ..."

languages.text: « Empereur, guidez ma main destinée à ouvrir et soigner la chair des souffrants. Que ma main et mon cœur ne tremblent pas… »
languages.original_text: "Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."

traits.locale_text: « Empereur, guidez ma main destinée à ouvrir et soigner la chair des souffrants. Que ma main et mon cœur ne tremblent pas… »

languages.text: «Emperador, guía mi mano, pues mi destino es cortar y sanar la carne de quienes sufren. No permitas que mi corazón ni mi mano flaqueen...».
languages.original_text: "Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."

traits.locale_text: «Emperador, guía mi mano, pues mi destino es cortar y sanar la carne de quienes sufren. No permitas que mi corazón ni mi mano flaqueen...».
